component.name: Actiona Run
component.summary: Run JavaScript and TypeScript desktop automation scripts

description.p: Actiona Run is the command-line runtime for Actiona 4. It executes JavaScript and TypeScript scripts that automate desktop tasks such as input simulation, screenshots, notifications, file operations, and application control.
This release focuses on the scripting runtime. A graphical editor similar to the one from Actiona 3 is planned separately, while Actiona Run is primarily intended to be used from a terminal.
